arts.ttl: Arsenal stance on Raheem Sterling has emerged after disastrous season for Gunners
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling joined Arsenal from Chelsea on loan in the summer last year. The former Manchester City man, who has the experience of winning the Premier League with Pep Guardiola’s team, was expected to offer experience, depth and quality to Mikel Arteta’s side. arts.ttl: Man Utd blow in chase for Ruben Amorim replacement
arts.sum: Manchester United are considering hiring Max Allegri to replace Ruben Amorim as manager but AC Milan have now entered the chase for the Italian coach. And Fichajes reported that former Juventus and Milan manager Allegri has jumped to the front of the queue in the list of possible replacements.

arts.sum: Ahead of Arsenal's trip to Old Trafford, football.london have taken a look at the latest news from the Gunners... After two games without a win in the top flight, the Gunners need to record maximum points if they stand any chance of pipping Liverpool and putting some late pressure on.
